tasks.subject: Task 1: Resolve extra_usage semantic in anthropic_oauth
tasks.description:
Pin the resolved cents/overage semantic with a regression test; replace the 'semantic UNKNOWN' ExtraUsage doc + client.rs provenance comment. Files: crates/anthropic_oauth/src/types.rs:68-93, crates/anthropic_oauth/src/client.rs:189-191 + tests. Verify: cargo test -p anthropic_oauth && cargo clippy -p anthropic_oauth --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt -p anthropic_oauth -- --check. Full code in the plan .md Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/anthropic_oauth/src/types.rs","crates/anthropic_oauth/src/client.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo test -p anthropic_oauth && cargo clippy -p anthropic_oauth --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo fmt -p anthropic_oauth -- --check","acceptanceCriteria":["extra_usage_reconciled_cents_semantic test passes (2500->25_000_000, 2092->20_920_000)","ExtraUsage doc states resolved cents/overage semantic","client.rs comment cites the spike","no struct field changes, x10_000 unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Surface extra_usage + hard-label estimate in print_sections
tasks.description:
Replace the extra_usage suppression (main.rs:838-839) with an honest EXTRA USAGE block; hard-label ANTHROPIC API COST (main.rs:919-927) as ESTIMATE ONLY / not billed. Verify: cargo build -p balanze_cli && cargo clippy -p balanze_cli --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace && cargo fmt -p balanze_cli -- --check. Full code in the plan .md Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files":["crates/balanze_cli/src/main.rs"],"verifyCommand":"cargo build -p balanze_cli && cargo clippy -p balanze_cli --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace && cargo fmt -p balanze_cli -- --check","acceptanceCriteria":["EXTRA USAGE block renders when is_enabled, 'disabled' when off, nothing when None","reuses micro_usd_to_display_dollars","ANTHROPIC API COST hard-labeled ESTIMATE ONLY / not billed","cargo test --workspace green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Compact grid — lead with real overage, mark estimate, fix legend
tasks.description:
Rewrite compact_anthropic_cost (main.rs:1069-1084) so real overage leads when enabled and the estimate is always tagged leverage-not-billed; update the compact legend (main.rs:1037-1039) to name the overage. Verify: cargo build -p balanze_cli && cargo clippy -p balanze_cli --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace && cargo fmt -p balanze_cli -- --check. Full code in the plan .md Task 3.

tasks.subject: Task 5: Doc sync — correct false PRD premise, reframe Track C, README/CHANGELOG/design/spike
tasks.description:
Reframe docs/prd.md:271-275 + :323 (premise disproven across 790 files; real cost = statusline/Track D; Track C = relabel + overage; Open-Q RESOLVED), replace README extra_usage Known-issues bullet, add CHANGELOG [Unreleased] Track C entry, correct the spike artifact (5 wire fields only + premise note) and sync the design doc. Verify: git grep -n 'per-event cost' docs/prd.md (no false claim) ; cargo test --workspace. Full prose in the plan .md Task 5.
